hero.title: Exceptional Catering
hero.subtitle: From intimate family gatherings to large corporate events, Ria's Cuisine delivers unforgettable culinary experiences with authentic African flavors and international favorites.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive catering solutions tailored to make your event truly memorable.

items.title: Wedding Catering
items.description: Elegant menus and full-service catering for weddings. We create memorable dining experiences that complement your special day.

items.title: Corporate Catering
items.description: Professional catering for meetings, conferences, and business events. Impress your clients and colleagues with exceptional cuisine.

items.title: Birthday Celebrations
items.description: Customized menus for birthdays and private parties. Let us make your celebration deliciously unforgettable.

items.title: Family Events
items.description: Food for reunions, anniversaries, and family gatherings. Bringing families together through the joy of great food.

items.title: Community & Cultural Events
items.description: Large-scale catering for festivals and community celebrations. We handle events of any size with professionalism and care.

items.title: Custom Catering
items.description: Personalized catering solutions tailored to any event. Your vision, our culinary expertise — the perfect pairing.

about.title: About Ria's Cuisine
about.subtitle: Passionately bringing people together through exceptional food.
about.paragraph1: Ria's Cuisine is passionate about bringing people together through exceptional food. While rooted in African culinary traditions, we create customized menus to suit every event and every guest.
about.paragraph2: Our mission is to make every celebration memorable through outstanding cuisine and professional service.
about.tagline: Made with love, served with passion

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from the clients who trust us to make their events extraordinary.

items.name: Sarah & James
items.content: Ria's Cuisine made our wedding day absolutely perfect. The food was outstanding, and the presentation was elegant. Our guests are still raving about the jollof rice!

items.name: Michael T.
items.content: We hired Ria's Cuisine for our annual conference. Professional, punctual, and the food was exceptional. They handled 300+ guests seamlessly.

items.name: Amara K.
items.content: The customized menu for my son's birthday was a hit! The kids loved the food, and the adults appreciated the authentic African flavors. Highly recommend!

items.name: Community Center
items.content: For our cultural festival, Ria's Cuisine delivered beyond expectations. Their ability to cater to diverse dietary needs while maintaining quality is impressive.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Ready to make your event unforgettable? Tell us about your event and we'll create the perfect menu.

section4.heading: Responsible for content according to § 55 Abs. 2 RStV

section5.heading: Disclaimer
section5.body:
The contents of this website have been compiled with the utmost care. However, we cannot assume any liability for the correctness, completeness, and up-to-dateness of the contents.

As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with § 7 para.1 TMG under general laws. According to §§ 8 to 10 TMG, we are not obligated as a service provider to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances indicating illegal activity.

section6.heading: Privacy
section6.body: The use of our website is generally possible without providing personal data. Where personal data (such as name, address, or email addresses) is collected on our pages, this is always done on a voluntary basis. This data will not be passed on to third parties without your express consent.

overview.heading: Privacy at a Glance
overview.body:
We take the protection of your personal data very seriously. This privacy policy informs you about how we process your data on our website.

Using our website is generally possible without providing personal data. If you send inquiries via our contact form, we collect personal data solely for the purpose of processing your request.

dataCollected.heading: What Data We Collect
dataCollected.body:
When contacting us via our form, we collect: name, email address, phone number, event type, event date, number of guests, venue location, budget range, and your message.

When visiting the website, technical data such as IP address, browser type, and access time are automatically collected. This data is not personal and is used exclusively for statistical analysis and security.

purpose.heading: Purpose of Data Processing
purpose.body:
Your data is used exclusively to process your catering inquiry, to communicate with you, and to create individual offers.

Data is not passed on to third parties unless you have expressly consented or we are legally obligated to do so.

cookies.heading: Cookies
cookies.body:
Our website does not use tracking cookies or third-party cookies. Only technically necessary session cookies are used, which are required for the operation of the website.

These cookies are automatically deleted after your browser session ends.

rights.heading: Your Rights
rights.body:
You have the right to information about the personal data stored by us at any time. You also have the right to correction, deletion, or restriction of the processing of your data.

If you have any questions about data protection, please contact us by email.

contact.heading: Data Protection Contact
contact.body:
Ria's Cuisine
Streitzeuggasse 1
50667 Cologne
Germany
Email: info@riascuisine.com
Phone: 0049 176 62028482

essential.heading: Essential Cookies
essential.body: These cookies are strictly necessary for the operation of the website and cannot be disabled. They enable core functions such as navigation and access to secure areas.

analytics.heading: Analytics Cookies
analytics.body: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting anonymous information.

preferences.heading: Preference Cookies
preferences.body: These cookies allow the website to remember your preferences to provide a personalized experience.

manage.heading: Cookie Management
manage.body: You can adjust your cookie settings at any time. Essential cookies are always active. Analytics and preference cookies can be toggled as you wish.
